title: Red Hat Security Advisory: resource-agents security update
overview:
An update for resource-agents is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 Extended Lifecycle Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: resource-agents security update

An update for resource-agents is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 Extended Lifecycle Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for resource-agents is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 Extended Lifecycle Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
resource-agents-4.1.1-61.el7_9.23.src.rpm
resource-agents-debuginfo-4.1.1-61.el7_9.23.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-sap-4.1.1-61.el7_9.23.x86_64.rpm
sap-cluster-connector-3.0.1-37.el7_9.23.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-sap-hana-4.1.1-61.el7_9.23.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-sap-hana-scaleout-0.164.0-6.el7_9.23.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-4.1.1-61.el7_9.23.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-aliyun-4.1.1-61.el7_9.23.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-gcp-4.1.1-61.el7_9.23.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-4.1.1-61.el7_9.23.ppc64le.rpm
resource-agents-debuginfo-4.1.1-61.el7_9.23.ppc64le.rpm
resource-agents-sap-4.1.1-61.el7_9.23.ppc64le.rpm
sap-cluster-connector-3.0.1-37.el7_9.23.ppc64le.rpm
resource-agents-sap-hana-4.1.1-61.el7_9.23.ppc64le.rpm
resource-agents-sap-hana-scaleout-0.164.0-6.el7_9.23.ppc64le.rpm

CVE-2026-23490: pyasn1 is a generic ASN.1 library for Python. Prior to 0.6.2, a Denial-of-Service issue has been found that leads to memory exhaustion from malformed RELATIVE-OID with excessive continuation octets. This vulnerability is fixed in 0.6.2.
